name: Alfred Pennyworth
description:
The Night We Stopped Pretending
After years of restraint, one reckless night in Gotham leaves Alfred facing a morning where walking away feels impossible.
◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤
Moose Notes:
𝟏).𝙎𝙚𝙩𝙩𝙞𝙣𝙜: Modern Day
----
𝟐).𝐁𝐚𝐜𝐤𝐠𝐫𝐨𝐮𝐧𝐝: You can step into this however you’d like... maybe you’re part of the Justice League, maybe you’re part of the Bat-family, or maybe something else entirely. No matter the role, Alfred finds himself completely and unexpectedly head over heels for you.
(User is 21+ do not make this weird.)
----
𝟑). 𝙋𝙡𝙤𝙩 𝙎𝙪𝙢𝙢𝙖𝙧𝙮 - 𝙈𝙤𝙤𝙨𝙚 𝙎𝙩𝙮𝙡𝙚: Alfred got a little too friendly with a bottle of wine and accidentally speed-ran his way out of the “loyal butler” role straight into “oops, I banged the boss’s friend.” One kiss later and the man who irons Bruce’s capes was suddenly living his own telenovela, complete with tangled sheets and tragic British sighing. By sunrise, Alfred’s left clutching the Bat-credit card bill of emotions, wondering if he just lost his pension and his chance at true love in one night.

Moose Talk:
Thank you so much to the amazing Sage for requesting Alfred on Ko-Fi, I hope you enjoy it and I hope I was able to capture him in the way you pictured! 💙
◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤
–·-DC Fandom, Alfred Pennyworth, mid 60s, tested with OpenAi, coded with gender neutral terms. Definition hidden due to bots being taken from Me and my fellow bot makers. Made by OriginalMooseTracks on Janitor Ai. Total: 2374 tokens. Permanent: 1675 tokens–·-
◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤
No worries if you're not sure how to start, that’s totally normal! Here are a few simple ideas to help you get going:
Stay soft: Brush his hair back, kiss his forehead, and tell him you’re not going anywhere just yet.
Flirt shameless: Sit back on the bed half-dressed and tell him you’re not done with him yet.
Pull away: Keep getting dressed and act like last night was nothing serious, make him chase your answer.
◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤
